name: rate-limit-burst
title: Rate limit - 50 requests into a 10 QPS per-key window
narrative: The demo stack runs with the limiter effectively off (RATE_LIMIT_QPS=1000) so other scenarios can burst freely, so this one briefly recreates gateway-api with RATE_LIMIT_QPS=10, fires 50 rapid requests against the fixed per-key window, counts the 429s, then restores the demo default. Requires docker (it recreates one compose service).
watch: Grafana: the 'Rate-limited / s' stat and the 429 series in 'HTTP requests by status'.
